news.t: Zacks Investment Management Expands ETF Suite with the Launch of GROZ

holdings.infoBox: GROZ is an equity ETF with a total of 41 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 9.63%, NVIDIA at 9.47%, Alphabet at 8.19%, Microsoft at 5.93%, and Broadcom at 5.68%.

overview.description: The Zacks Focus Growth ETF (GROZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, aiming to provide long-term capital appreciation and minimize loss, through a portfolio of US large-cap growth stocks. Holdings are selected and weighted based on a proprietary AI tool combined with Zacks research. GROZ was launched on Dec 5, 2024 and is issued by Zacks.

data.title: Zacks Investment Management Expands ETF Suite with the Launch of GROZ
data.text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Zacks Investment Management, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Zacks Investment Research with $20 billion in assets under management, announces the launch of its third actively-ma...
